Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x08D0 "PROTENNISSIMULATOR-08D0" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pro Tennis Simulator.prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the JSR $0AF6 call at $0915 to remove the manual protection step.
